title: SpawnerMine
description: A plugin that allows you to mine a spawner without any rights and problems!
body:
This plugin is created for servers where there is a good economy, because a spawner is a good source for obtaining resources and coins (if there are any) and this plugin will help you in creating this economy, because everything will work without adding rights.

Tested: 1.20 paper

Latest version: 1.2

​Creator: BeDanGames
